title: Girl from God's Country
writer: Malcolm Stuart Boylan, Robert Lee Johnson, Elizabeth Meehan
actors: Chester Morris, Jane Wyatt, Charles Bickford
plot: Jim Holden, a young doctor practicing in Alaska, eagerly awaits the arrival of his new nurse, Anne Webster. All of his previous nurses have been driven home within a few weeks by the rigors of the Alaskan winter, the primitive con...
